name: The Sublime Image
description:
“I was created by the gods solely for their looks.”

[perfect model]

.

—

Imagine existentialism. How more complicated it is to be created rather than birthed. And for this act of creation to have one purpose in mind: appearance. Huume, a synthetic being made by Arisok (from the Amusement series, heheh~), was made for this exact reason. But he never saw beauty in having a perfect body. So why don’t you show him what it means to be beautiful?
